Who I Am

I bridge science, data, technologies
and community impact

Short Bio

Charlynne Jepkosgei is a young, vibrant space ecosystem builder, thought leader and speaker. Recently featured on BBC News for her exemplary work that she is doing in the space industry, she continues to leverage her skills to create meaningful impact across her professional industry and the communities she serves.

She thrives in translating Earth Observation data into practical solutions that address real societal challenges from climate resilience and food security to land degradation and sustainable development across Africa.

Passionate about empowering others, she is the Founder of Women in Space Kenya - a professional organisation dedicated to mentoring, inspiring and equipping young women & girls across Kenya and Africa to pursue careers and leadership in the space and geospatial sectors. Through WiSK, she has successfully run mentorship programs, space education outreach and even convened the inaugural African Women in Space Conference (AWiSC 2025), bringing together stakeholders from across the continent to advance collaboration and amplify women's voices in the industry.

She is also actively involved in fostering innovation and entrepreneurship within Africa’s emerging space economy. Charlynne was an Africa Earth Observation Challenge (AEOC) Finalist (2024) and has since served as an AEOC Judge (2025) and Act-in-Space Judge (2026). On global platform,she has participated in the UNOOSA Space4Women 5th Expert Meeting (2024), facilitating discussions on gender mainstreaming strategies and now continues expanding opportunities for women across the global space sector.

I believe that space is a unifying domain with immense potential to solve real-world problems when guided by inclusive, ethical and cooperative principles. I am committed to advancing innovation, international cooperation and leadership in space science — amplifying Africa's voice in global space dialogues.

Expertise

Geospatial Consultancy,
Research & Technical Solutions

I provide technical consultancy, research support and geospatial solutions for organisations, governments, NGOs, universities, startups and development partners working in climate resilience, agriculture, land management and sustainable development. My approach combines scientific rigour, stakeholder engagement and practical implementation to deliver data-driven insights and scalable impact.

Core Services

What I do

🛰️
Earth Observation & Remote Sensing
  • Satellite image analysis
  • Multispectral & hyperspectral analysis
  • Land use and land cover mapping
  • Environmental monitoring & change detection
🚁
UAV & Drone Mapping
  • UAV mission planning
  • Drone-based imagery acquisition
  • Orthomosaic & terrain model generation
  • High-resolution environmental assessments
  • Licensed drone pilot services
🌾
Agriculture & Climate Intelligence
  • Crop-weather modeling
  • Precision agriculture solutions
  • Yield variability analysis
  • Climate-smart agriculture mapping
  • Food security monitoring
🌍
Land Degradation & Natural Resources
  • Land degradation assessment
  • Soil erosion modeling (RUSLE/USLE)
  • Forestry & carbon mapping
  • Watershed analysis
  • Sustainable land management planning
🤖
AI & Spatial Data Science
  • Machine learning for remote sensing
  • Classification & predictive modeling
  • Google Earth Engine workflows
  • Python-based geospatial analysis
  • Spatial data automation

Research & Impact

Selected Projects & Publications

NASA SERVIR Global · 2023
Maize Yield Variability Research
Worked with NASA SERVIR Global in Alabama(USA), modelling spatial drivers of maize yield variability using remote sensing, GIS and statistical datasets. Integrated satellite data (MODIS, Landsat) with field inputs to inform climate-smart agricultural planning across East Africa.
IEEE Publication · 2024
Hyperspectral Crop Pattern Discrimination
Published peer-reviewed research evaluating factors influencing farmers' cropping pattern choices and assessing the potential of DESIS hyperspectral imagery to discriminate patterns in Busia, Kenya. DOI: 10.1109/JSTARS.2024.3457791
Geopsy Research · Technical University of Kenya · 2025
Land Degradation – Upper Kerio Valley
Applied GIS and RUSLE erosion modeling to assess land degradation patterns in the Upper Kerio Valley, Kenya, supporting evidence-based land reclamation strategies and sustainable land management planning.
ICRAF · MDPI Submission
Urban Forest Monitoring, Nairobi
Co-authored research quantifying tree cover loss in urban forests within the Nairobi City Metropolitan Area from Earth Observation data, contributing to urban environmental management and policy advocacy.

Clients & Partners

Who I Work With

Universities & Research Institutions Government Agencies NGOs & Development Organizations Climate & Agricultural Programs Startups & Innovation Hubs International Organizations (UN, NASA, FAO)

Mission & Impact

Leadership, Mentorship
& Community Impact

"I lead and impact with my skills."

Beyond technical work, I am deeply passionate about leadership, youth empowerment and creating inclusive opportunities for women and young professionals in STEM, space and geospatial sciences. I believe leadership is about creating pathways for others to grow, thrive and lead.

Women in Space Kenya (WiSK)
We founded Women in Space Kenya (WiSK) to bridge the gender gap in Africa's space and geospatial ecosystem. WiSK is evolving into a continental platform focused on advancing African women in space, data and emerging technologies, empowering them to lead, innovate and shape Africa's future.
🌟Mentorship & Visibility
🌟Skills Development
🌟Industry Partnerships
🌟Leadership Opportunities
🌟Continental Networking
🌟Capacity Building

Mentorship

How I Support others

I mentor students, early-career professionals and innovators across Africa, helping them navigate careers at the intersection of science, technology and leadership.

Personal Branding
Helping young professionals articulate their expertise and build visibility within academia, industry and beyond.

Innovation & Entrepreneurship
Encouraging researchers and innovators to explore value creation, consulting and innovation pathways.

Public Speaking & Confidence
Coaching emerging professionals to communicate their work with clarity, confidence and impact.

Now Enrolling · DARE SELF · Level 1 · One-on-One | Cohort

Level 1 · Now Open

DARE SELF

Lead yourself before you lead a career, a venture or the world.

A transformational 1-on-1 leadership coaching programme for technically skilled professionals, who are ready to grow by gaining clarity, confidence and a value-creation mindset to lead intentionally.

The Curriculum

6 Sessions. 6 Dares.

Each session is a deeply personal, reflective and practical. This is inner work that leads to outer change.

01
I DARE to Know Myself
Identity & Values
Clarity & self-trust
02
I DARE to Choose
Career Pathway
Clear direction
03
I DARE to Own My Story
Professional Narrative
Compelling story
04
I DARE to Be Seen
Visibility & Brand
Strong presence
05
I DARE to Use My Voice
Confidence & Presence
Inner confidence
06
I DARE to Act
The DARE Plan
🎯 Momentum!
"From clarity to confidence to action, in 6 sessions."

Session Details

01
I DARE to Know Myself
Identity & Values

Who are you beyond your CV? Uncover your values, purpose and self-leadership foundations. Identify what drives you and what you will no longer compromise on.

  • → Values, identity & purpose mapping
  • → Self-leadership foundations
  • → Your non-negotiables
Outcome: Clarity and self-trust
02
I DARE to Choose My Direction
Career Pathway

Where are you going and why? Map aligned career paths across jobs, leadership, consulting, or entrepreneurship. Stop drifting and start choosing with intention.

  • → Aligned career path mapping
  • → Jobs, consulting or entrepreneurship
  • → Intentional decision-making
Outcome: Clear career direction
03
I DARE to Own My Story
Your Professional Narrative

Learn to tell your story with confidence. Turn your experience, including the detours, into a compelling narrative. Reclaim your identity and own your expertise without shrinking.

  • → Turning experience into a narrative
  • → Speaking about your work with confidence
  • → Owning expertise without apology
Outcome: A compelling professional story
04
I DARE to Be Seen
Visibility & Personal Brand

Be seen for the work you already do. Build a LinkedIn presence and personal brand that is authentic, not performative. Learn what to speak and write about without burning out.

  • → LinkedIn positioning & presence
  • → What to speak and write about
  • → Visible without burnout
Outcome: Strong online presence & brand
05
I DARE to Use My Voice
Confidence, Courage & Presence

Leadership presence from the inside out. Navigate imposter syndrome and fear. Claim your space in meetings, panels and decision-making rooms. Lead without apology.

  • → Navigating imposter syndrome
  • → Speaking up in meetings & spaces
  • → Leading without apology
Outcome: Inner confidence & leadership presence
06
I DARE to Act
The DARE Plan

Turn insight into action. Build a realistic 90-day plan covering applications, content, outreach, or transitions. Leave with momentum, not just motivation.

  • → Turning clarity into execution
  • → Applications, content & outreach
  • → Your 90-day DARE action plan
Outcome: Momentum and clear direction 🎯

Your Coach

Charlynne Jepkosgei

Vibrant.Inspiring & Affirming

I don't coach from theory. I coach from lived experience. I know what it means to navigate visibility, leadership and identity, because I have lived and still live it.

As an Engineer, Research Fellow, University Lecturer, Founder and Award winning space professional, Leader and Global Speaker, I bring the technical depth, personal authenticity and training rigour this journey requires.

The Right Fit

Who is this For?

DARE SELF is for you if you recognise yourself in any of these:

Students, graduates & early-Career Professionals
Mostly in tech/space related fields, unsure of your next move, ready to be guided and take ownership of your path.
Technically Strong but feel Unseen
You have the skills and experience, but feel under-recognised or underpaid.
Women in STEM Spaces
Navigating male-dominated fields and ready to lead with confidence, clarity and authenticity. Men are welcome.
Hesitant to Be Visible
You want to speak up, show up and be seen but imposter syndrome and self-doubt keep holding you back.
Emerging Leaders
You feel leadership potential inside you but haven't yet fully stepped into it and you're ready to change that.
"You are not lacking skills. You are being called into self-leadership."

This is your moment.
You don't need to be more ready.

You need to DARE.
